title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 23/01/2024
Image reference: 2024-01-23_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-23-2024_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker Values firmed small amounts across the board
Panamax Kerveros (76,600 DWT, Aug 2003, Imabari) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 9.35 mil, VV Value USD 9.55 mil
Ultramax CP Tianjin (63,500 DWT, Sep 2016, Chengxi) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 24.00 mil, VV Value USD 24.66 mil
Handymax Best Honor (47,200 DWT, Apr 1998, Oshima) sold to unknown Turkish buyers for USD 4.82 mil, VV Value USD 5.20 mil
Tankers : Older VLCC and LR1 tonnage decreased due to recent deals, whilst older Aframax tonnage increased
LR2 Fair Seas (115,400 DWT, Jul 2008, STX Offshore) sold to Shenzhen Brightoil Shipping for USD 43.50 mil (SS/DD Passed), VV Value USD 41.19 mil
LR1 Pataris (73,800 DWT, Apr 2009, New Times Shipbuilding) sold to Trafigura Beheer BV for USD 26 mil (SS/DD Due), VV Value USD 25.03 mil
LR1 Brook Trout & Lake Trout (73,700 DWT, Aug-Oct 2007, STX Offshore) sold to Emarat Maritime for USD 52 mil, VV Value USD 53.77 mil
MR2 (Chem/Procut) STI Tribeca (50,000 DWT, Jan 2015, SPP) sold to Undisclosed buyers for USD 39.10 mil, VV Value USD
